mapper.select: SELECT mno, eaten_date AS stat_date, SUM(total_kcal) AS total_kcal, SUM(protein) AS protein, SUM(carbs) AS carbs, SUM(fat) AS fat, COUNT(*) AS meal_count FROM diets WHERE eaten_date = #{date} GROUP BY mno, eaten_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_nutrition_stats (mno, stat_date, total_kcal, protein, carbs, fat, meal_count) VALUES (#{mno}, #{statDate}, #{totalKcal}, #{protein}, #{carbs}, #{fat}, #{mealCount})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM daily_nutrition_stats WHERE mno = #{mno} ORDER BY stat_date DESC LIMIT 14

SELECT mno, eaten_date AS stat_date, SUM(total_kcal) AS total_kcal, SUM(protein) AS protein, SUM(carbs) AS carbs, SUM(fat) AS fat, COUNT(*) AS meal_count FROM diets WHERE mno = #{mno} AND eaten_date BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} GROUP BY mno, eaten_date ORDER BY eaten_date ASC
